dsl_rule.translation_notes: Diamond pattern detection mapped to Donchian breakouts: upward breakout (close above dc_upper) acts as continuation signal for LONG entry; downward breakout (close below dc_lower) acts as reversal signal for SHORT entry. Exit conditions set to reversals at Donchian midline per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Pattern identified by price formation entering from bottom with dual breakout possibilities. Bullkowski statistics indicate 88 bull-market up-breakout formations with 27% average rise on continuation.

source_rule_text: Diamond pattern: Price enters from bottom (tops) with downward breakout acts as reversal; upward breakout acts as continuation
